home.subtitle: Open an existing story project or create a new one.
home.title: Story title
home.author: Author
home.apiOffline: API server offline. Start with: pnpm api:dev

explorer.title: Explorer
explorer.createCharacterHint: Give your character a memorable name. A markdown file will be created in characters/.
explorer.createLocationHint: Name a place in your story world. It will be saved under locations/.
explorer.createItemHint: Add an object, artifact, or prop. It will be saved under items/.
explorer.createChapterHint: Start a new chapter file. StoryLoom will assign the next chapter number automatically.
explorer.createShortcutHint: Enter to create · Esc to cancel
explorer.nameInvalid: Name must contain at least one letter or number.

graph.title: Story Graph
graph.empty: Build the graph to visualize wikilink connections.

ai.title: AI Copilot
ai.subtitle: Collaborate with your story assistant — you stay in control.
ai.notConfigured: Configure AI provider in Settings first.
ai.placeholder: Write your reply to the copilot…
ai.placeholderAction: Press Run to start this action, or add notes here…
ai.noFindings: No plot holes found — your story looks consistent.
ai.sendHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
ai.runPlotHoles: Check plot holes across the story
ai.hintInterview: The interviewer asks questions and proposes story parts you can add with one click — character details, plot beats, world facts.
ai.hintWhatIf: Explore alternate plot branches for a chapter. Set the chapter reference, then press Run.
ai.hintPlotHoles: Scan your canon for inconsistencies. Critical issues appear in red; suggestions help you fix them.
ai.hintStyle: Local analysis of your canon chapters — sentence length, dialogue ratio, and vocabulary. No AI call required.
ai.hintGenerate: Preview generated content, then approve to save using your Settings write mode, or pick parts to merge into your chapter.
ai.selectChapterHint: Choose a chapter from your project, or another markdown file for context.
ai.noFiles: No markdown files found in this project.
ai.chapterRequired: Select a chapter or file before running.
ai.actionHint: Configure options in the sidebar, then press Run.
ai.appliedCount: Added {{count}} part(s) to your story files.
ai.mergedCount: Merged {{count}} part(s) into your story files with AI.
ai.plotHolesReady: Review the fixes below and add the ones you want to your story.
ai.applyModeAppendHint: Adds selected text to the end of the target file or section.
ai.applyModeIntegrateHint: AI reads the file, weaves suggestions in naturally, and rewrites the full file.
ai.criticalPlotHolesBanner: Generation blocked — critical plot holes found in canon.
ai.criticalPlotHolesHint: Fix the issues below, or enable Force despite plot holes in the sidebar.
ai.generateWritesSuggest: On approve: saves to reports/ (suggest mode from Settings).
ai.generateWritesDraft: On approve: writes a .draft.md file next to the chapter.
ai.generateWritesDirect: On approve: writes directly to the chapter file.

settings.title: Settings
settings.credentialsHint: Saved to .env in your project folder (gitignored). Leave key fields blank to keep existing keys.
settings.openaiBaseUrlHint: Custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint, e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1 or http://localhost:4000/v1
settings.ollamaBaseUrlHint: Used when provider is Ollama. /v1 is added automatically if omitted.
